requirement_source: g9vWbSYplh F1 (FR-D1..D7, FR-O4, AD-5a) — the Memory gap-closure PRD; F1 Cross-AI delivery owned by the browser-extension component, the write/compose client port (AD-5a; MCP is AD-5b, not this)

sources.title: PRD: Orvex Memory — Gap Closure (F1 FR-D1..D7, FR-O4)
Product Brief: Orvex Studio (cross-AI delivery + AI-privacy framing)
Architecture ruling: the extension is the write/compose client port (MCP = AD-5b, not it)
Viability spike — mechanism (extension vs bookmarklet vs native helper), OQ1/OQ8; gates the mechanism
Definition pack — freezes the contract; dispatch gate for every story
knowledge: vendor-API memory sync-out (FR-D6 cross-reference, NOT duplicated here)

repo.name: orvexai/orvex-studio-extension
repo.state: empty — governance README only, pre-definition scaffold

epics.title: [EPIC] extension: Foundation — MV3 scaffold, build+CI, AGPL-guard, contracts-codegen TS client & permissions floor

stories.title: [extension] MV3 scaffold — manifest v3 service worker + popup shell, env-only config, build + CI
[extension] Contracts-codegen TS client consumer + AGPL-import/license denylist + drift gate
[extension] Permissions minimization + CSP hardening + no-content-capture-beyond-compose baseline

epics.title: [EPIC] extension: Auth & delegated principal — one-step connect, scoped token, secure storage, per-assistant status

stories.title: [extension] Guided one-step connect — delegated principal mint, ≤3 taps ≤2 min, zero config
[extension] Scoped delegated token + secure extension storage, refresh & revoke, no secret leakage
[extension] Per-assistant connection-status surface + honest not-yet-supported messaging

epics.title: [EPIC] extension: Per-provider delivery adapters — injection framework, ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude/Grok posture

stories.title: [extension] Delivery-adapter framework — provider registry + own-compose-surface injection port
[extension] ChatGPT delivery adapter — inject enriched prompt into the user's compose surface
[extension] Gemini delivery adapter — inject enriched prompt into the user's compose surface
[extension] Claude + Grok posture — beachhead coverage + honest not-yet-supported, sync-out cross-ref

epics.title: [EPIC] extension: Consent & firewall gate at delivery — per-use consent, personal↔employer wall, no silent injection

stories.title: [extension] Per-use consent gate for private memories — never silent injection
[extension] Personal↔employer firewall enforcement at delivery + ToS-safe own-surface only
[extension] Delivery-boundary data minimization — no capture beyond compose, no exfiltration

epics.title: [EPIC] extension: Degradation & breakage canaries — copy/paste fallback, selector fixtures, fail-loud, team alert

stories.title: [extension] Copy/paste degradation fallback when a provider blocks injection
[extension] Selector fixtures + provider-UI breakage self-detection canary heartbeat
[extension] Fail-loud breakage UX + auto-fallback + team alert

epics.title: [EPIC] extension: Distribution, release & quality gates — store review, versioning/auto-update, E2E, a11y, FR-O4 usability

stories.title: [extension] Chrome Web Store + Firefox AMO packaging, review constraints, versioning & auto-update
[extension] E2E harness against provider web UIs — delivery + breakage-detection under CI
[extension] Popup a11y + dual-theme quality bar (consumer-grade)
[extension] FR-O4 first-run usability test — connect ≤3 taps ≤2 min, no config, verified
